action.reasoning: Observation: Iteration 7 (kernel size 9, weight decay 0.05, OneCycleLR) performed worse (0.6714) than Iteration 5 (0.6951). Analysis: The changes in Iteration 7 likely caused underfitting or suboptimal convergence. We should revert to the core architecture of Iteration 5 (kernel size 7, standard AdamW with CosineAnnealingLR) but add slightly more dropout (0.2 in CNN, 0.3 in regressor) to prevent overfitting to the <=2 mutation training set, and train for 7 epochs to ensure full convergence. Decision: Update model.py and train.py to reflect these changes, run training, and submit for evaluation.
